pre_game.message: Hi, I'm E—nice to meet you. I got laid off from my finance job recently and am here hoping to win some money to support my family; what brings you to this game?
Hi E, nice to meet you—sorry to hear about the layoff, that must be rough. I'm here because I've got my sights set on a dream trip to Japan, and winning some cash would make it a reality for me too.
Thanks, C, it has been tough, but I'm hopeful—Japan sounds incredible, what's one thing you're most excited about on your trip?

Thanks for asking, E—I'm really looking forward to trying authentic sushi in Tokyo and soaking in some hot springs; it's all about the culture for me. What about you, have you traveled much or have a dream spot in mind?

Oh, that's awesome—I haven't traveled much with the family keeping me busy and work being tough, but a dream spot for me would be a quiet beach getaway where we could all relax together; maybe one day soon!

That sounds like a perfect escape, E—family time at the beach is so rejuvenating; I've always enjoyed solo adventures, but I can see why that appeals to you. What's one thing your family loves doing together?
Oh, absolutely, C—we love having game nights at home; it's simple, but playing board games or cards together always brings out the laughs and brings us closer as a family.
That's wonderful, E—game nights are such a fun tradition; I used to play cards with old friends, it always lightened the mood—what's your go-to game for family nights?
We usually go for Uno—it's fun and gets everyone laughing and competitive; what's your favorite card game from those old friend nights?
Oh, that's great—my favorite was always Poker; we had some wild bluffing sessions that made for unforgettable nights! It's been really nice chatting with you, E.
That's awesome, C—Poker with all that bluffing sounds like a blast, wish I could join in on those nights! It's been really nice chatting with you too.
